items.title: Bayer agrees to $7.25B proposed settlement over thousands of Roundup cancer lawsuits
items.description: Bayer has agreed to a proposed $7.25 billion deal to settle thousands of U.S. lawsuits that blame Roundup for causing cancer

items.title: Trump family business files for trademark rights on airports using president's name
items.description: The Trump family company wants to trademark the use of the president’s name on any airports but says it doesn’t plan on charging a fee — at least for ...

items.title: Warner Bros reopens takeover talks with Paramount after receiving waiver from Netflix
items.description: Netflix is granting Warner Bros a waiver to reopen talks with Paramount.

items.title: Pritzker steps down from Hyatt board, deeply regrets association with Jeffrey Epstein
items.description: Thomas Pritzker will retire as the executive chairman of Hyatt Hotels after details of his affiliation with Jeffrey Epstein were revealed in documents...

items.title: Grok faces more scrutiny over deepfakes
items.description: X faces a new EU privacy investigation after its Grok chatbot generated nonconsensual deepfake images on the platform
